tagline: Automated video editing tools for content creators

policies.refund: No refunds after 7 days of purchase.
policies.support: 24/7 support is available only on the Pro plan. Basic plan users have access to email support during business hours.
policies.trial: A free trial may be available. Contact sales for details.

faqs.question: What is AutoStream?
faqs.answer: AutoStream is a SaaS platform providing automated video editing tools for content creators on platforms like YouTube, Instagram, TikTok, and more.

faqs.question: What is the difference between Basic and Pro?
faqs.answer: The Basic plan costs $29/month and allows 10 videos/month at 720p. The Pro plan costs $79/month with unlimited videos, 4K resolution, AI captions, and 24/7 support.

faqs.question: Can I get a refund?
faqs.answer: Refunds are available within 7 days of purchase. After 7 days, no refunds are issued.
